intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-compliant with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely compromised.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only substrate; no botanical growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Black pot contains substrate and a metallic spoon; no plant life detected.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains the white rabbit anchor and a single, struggling Pothos stem/leaf structure.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Introduction of a metallic spoon in the P2/P4 pot and a white cylindrical object (likely a tube or sensor) in the P1 pot area.

temporal_deltas.T_earliest_to_T_minus_3: Initial state shows minimal growth; P3 anchor is visible.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_3_to_T_minus_2: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the P2/P4 pot.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_2_to_T_minus_1: Significant lighting drop; visual data obscured.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_current: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near P1; P3 remains in a state of stasis/decline.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe neglect or failure. The lack of foliage in P1, P2, and P4 suggests total specimen loss. P3 is the only surviving occupant, showing signs of extreme stress.
anomalies: White cylindrical object in P1 pot
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The registry is largely aspirational, as the pots are mostly devoid of life. The presence of non-botanical items (spoon, cylinder) suggests human intervention or a repurposing of the desk space. P3 is the sole survivor, though its health is precarious.
